pred_text:
[8.16-14.00s] Sure! One time, I remember when I was at a dinner party with friends, and someone made a rude comment about someone's appearance. I stood up for that person and explained why their comment was hurtful. It felt really important to speak up and make sure everyone felt respected.
[15.44-21.92s] Exactly! It's hard to talk about personal struggles, but it's important to acknowledge them. In my case, I've struggled with anxiety, and it's taken time to learn how to manage it.
[22.96-23.00s] Absolutely! Overcoming my own struggles taught me a lot about empathy and resilience. It made me more patient and understanding with others.
